attributes.Sql Query:
SELECT 
 NDIT.DISTI_INVNTRY_TRX_LINE_ID_INT,
 NDIT.ON_HAND_QTY,
 NDIT.COMMITTED_QTY,
 NDIT.ON_ORDER_QTY,
 NDIT.DISTI_REPORTED_IN_TRANSIT_QTY,
 NDIT.BK_WIPS_ORIGINATOR_ID_INT,
 NDIT.PRODUCT_KEY,
 NDIT.DISTI_REPORTED_DISTI_WHSE_NUM,
 NDIT.LOCAL_CURRENCY_CD,
 NDIT.GLBL_PRC_LST_UNIT_PRC_USD_AMT,
 NDIT.GLBL_PRC_LST_UNIT_PRC_LCL_AMT ,
 NDIT.WHLSL_PRC_LST_UNIT_PRC_USD_AMT,
 NDIT.WHLSL_PRC_LST_UNIT_PRC_LCL_AMT,
 NDIT.DISTI_RPRTD_UNIT_PRC_USD_AMT,
 NDIT.DISTI_RPRTD_UNIT_PRC_LCL_AMT,
 NDIT.DISTRIBUTOR_WAREHOUSE_NUM,
 NDIT.VALUATION_PRICE_USD_AMT,
 NDIT.VALUATION_PRICE_LOCAL_AMT,
 NDIT.INVNTRY_VALUATION_USD_AMT,
 NDIT.INVNTRY_IN_TRNST_VLTN_USD_AMT,
 NDIT.BATCH_ID_INT,
 NDIT.INVENTORY_AS_OF_DT,
 NDIT.INVENTORY_TYPE_CD ,
 NDIT.SECOND_SOURCE_FLG,
 NDIT.BACKORDERED_QTY,
NDIT.SECOND_SOURCE_ISO_COUNTRY_CD,
 NDIT.LAST_UPDATE_DTM,
 NDIT.VENDOR_PART_NUM,
 NDIT.LOCAL_TO_USD_CURR_CONV_RT,
 NDIT.AVG_SELLING_PRICE_USD_AMT,
 NDIT.AVG_SELLING_PRICE_LOCAL_AMT,
 NDIT.VALUATION_PRICE_SOURCE_CD,
 NDIT.ACTIVE_FLG ,
 NDIT.CISCO_TO_DISTI_IN_TRANSIT_QTY,
 EDW_CREATE_USER,
 EDW_CREATE_DTM ,
 EDW_UPDATE_USER,
 CURRENT_TIMESTAMP(0) AS EDW_UPDATE_DTM,
 'E' AS ACTIVE_FLG,
 NDIT.OBSOLETE_QTY,                  
 NDIT.DISTRIBUTOR_RPRTD_IN_STOCK_QTY,
 NDIT.INVENTORY_VALUATION_LOCAL_AMT,
 NDIT.INVENTORY_OM_AVG_LOCAL_AMT,
 NDIT.INVENTORY_OM_AVG_USD_AMT,
 NDIT.OM_AVG_LOCAL_AMT,
 NDIT.OM_AVG_USD_AMT
FROM  $$STGDB.WI_WIPS_INV_TRANS_FST FST
INNER JOIN $$SLSORDVWDB.N_DISTI_INVENTORY_TRX_LINE NDIT
ON ( FST.INV_TYPE = NDIT.INVENTORY_TYPE_CD
	AND FST.SOURCE_PROFILE_ID = NDIT.BK_WIPS_ORIGINATOR_ID_INT
	AND NDIT.INVENTORY_AS_OF_DT>=FST.INVENTORY_DATE
	AND NDIT.ACTIVE_FLG  ='Y')

SELECT
EWIT.	INV_TRANS_ID                  	,
EWIT.	SRC_BATCH_ID                  	,
EWIT.	SOURCE_PROFILE_ID             	,
EWIT.	SOURCE_CUSTOMER_ID            	,
EWIT.	PARTNO_MAP_ID                 	,
EWIT.	STATUS                        	,
EWIT.	INVENTORY_DATE                	,
EWIT.	ORG_INVENTORY_DATE            	,
EWIT.	VENDOR_PART_NO                	,
EWIT.	MFG_PART_NO                   	,
EWIT.	PRODUCT_DESC                  	,
EWIT.	REPORTED_UNIT_PRICE_LC        	,
EWIT.	REPORTED_EXTENDED_PRICE_LC    	,
EWIT.	CONVERSION_RATE               	,
EWIT.	REPORTED_UNIT_PRICE_USD       	,
EWIT.	CISCO_WPL_UNIT_PRICE          	,
EWIT.	VALUATION_PRICE               	,
EWIT.	ORG_VALUATION_PRICE           	,
EWIT.	SPECIAL_PRICE                 	,
EWIT.	QTY_ON_HAND                   	,
EWIT.	COMMITTED_QTY                 	,
EWIT.	STOCK_QTY                     	,
EWIT.	ON_ORDER_QTY                  	,
EWIT.	BACKORDER_QTY                 	,
EWIT.	IN_TRANSIT_QTY                	,
EWIT.	OTHER_QTY                     	,
EWIT.	PROD_FAMILY                   	,
EWIT.	PROD_CATEGORY                 	,
EWIT.	PROD_TYPE                     	,
EWIT.	PROD_GROUP                    	,
EWIT.	BUSINESS_GROUP                	,
EWIT.	BUSINESS_UNIT                 	,
EWIT.	POSTED_DATE                   	,
EWIT.	POST_FISC_YR                  	,
EWIT.	POST_FISC_PRD                 	,
EWIT.	INV_FISC_YR                   	,
EWIT.	INV_FISC_PRD                  	,
EWIT.	PARSED_PART_NUM               	,
EWIT.	PARSED                        	,
EWIT.	SECOND_SOURCE_NAME            	,
EWIT.	SECOND_SOURCE_COUNTRY_CODE    	,
EWIT.	ADJUSTED_FLAG                 	,
EWIT.	ACTIVE_FLAG                   	,
EWIT.	CREATED_BY                    	,
EWIT.	CREATION_DATE                 	,
EWIT.	UPDATED_BY                    	,
EWIT.	LAST_UPDATE_DATE              	,
EWIT.	REPORTED_CURRENCY_CODE        	,
EWIT.	CISCO_WPL_UNIT_PRICE_LC       	,
EWIT.	CISCO_GPL_UNIT_PRICE          	,
EWIT.	CISCO_GPL_UNIT_PRICE_LC       	,
EWIT.	VALUATION_PRICE_LC            	,
EWIT.	OBSOLETE_QUANTITY             	,
EWIT.	INVENTORY_LOCATION            	,
EWIT.	INV_TYPE                      	,
EWIT.	SECOND_SOURCE                 	,
EWIT.	AVERAGE_SELLING_PRICE         	,
EWIT.	AVERAGE_SELLING_PRICE_LC      	,
EWIT.	VALUATION_PRICE_SOURCE        	,
EWIT.	BATCH_ID                      	,
EWIT.	ACTION_CODE                   	,
EWIT.	START_ACTIVE_DATE             	,
EWIT.	END_ACTIVE_DATE               	,
EWIT.	AVG_PRICE_LC					
FROM 
$$EXCEPDB.EX_WIPS_INV_TRANS EWIT
WHERE NOT EXISTS ( SELECT 1 FROM $$STGDB.ST_WIPS_INV_TRANS SWP
WHERE SWP.INV_TRANS_ID = EWIT.INV_TRANS_ID )

SELECT 
ST_WIPS_INV_TRANS.INV_TYPE ,
ST_WIPS_INV_TRANS.SOURCE_PROFILE_ID, 
ST_WIPS_INV_TRANS.INVENTORY_DATE
FROM $$STGDB.ST_WIPS_INV_TRANS 
GROUP BY 1,2,3

SELECT 
DIT.INVENTORY_TYPE_CD, 
DIT.BK_WIPS_ORIGINATOR_ID_INT, 
DIT.INVENTORY_AS_OF_DT
FROM $$STGDB.WI_WIPS_INV_TRANS_DIST WIP
INNER JOIN $$SLSORDVWDB.N_DISTI_INVENTORY_TRX_LINE DIT
ON ( DIT.INVENTORY_TYPE_CD = WIP.INV_TYPE
AND DIT.BK_WIPS_ORIGINATOR_ID_INT = WIP.SOURCE_PROFILE_ID
AND DIT.INVENTORY_AS_OF_DT < WIP.INVENTORY_DATE
AND DIT.ACTIVE_FLG='Y' )  
QUALIFY ROW_NUMBER () OVER (PARTITION BY DIT.INVENTORY_TYPE_CD, DIT.BK_WIPS_ORIGINATOR_ID_INT ORDER BY DIT.INVENTORY_AS_OF_DT DESC) =1
